headline: Here's Why You Should Retain GEHC Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: GE HealthCare rides a strong backlog, innovation and diagnostics growth, but tariffs and margin pressures threaten to temper its forward momentum.

headline: GE HealthCare Wins FDA 510(k) Clearance for Photonova Spectra PCCT
summary: GEHC gains FDA nod for Photonova Spectra, a next-gen photon-counting CT system to boost diagnostic precision, workflow efficiency and imaging insights.

raw.headline: GE HealthCare Wins FDA 510(k) Clearance for Photonova Spectra PCCT

headline: GE HealthCare advances imaging lineup with photon-counting CT system clearance
summary: Photonova’s PCCT technology’s ‘universal scan’ approach is designed to drive efficiencies and reduce complexity across multiple CT exam types.

raw.headline: GE HealthCare advances imaging lineup with photon-counting CT system clearance

headline: GE HealthCare wins FDA nod for photon-counting CT technology
summary: The 510(k) decision clears the company to challenge Siemens Healthineers for an emerging part of the CT imaging sector.
